get.summary: List of keys in CSV file
get.description: Generates CSV file with the list of keys

post.description: Receives the address key registration request

201.description: Address key registration request successfully accepted

delete.description: Deletes an addressing key in Central Bank.

202.description: Request to delete the key was successful

get.summary: Query portability or ownership claims (Donor PSP point of view).
get.description: Return a list of claims based on the given parameters.

200.description: List of claims based on the given parameters.

post.description: Confirm/cancel creation of either a portability claim or ownership claim for an addressing key.

requestBody.description: Request body to confirm or cancel.

202.description: Creation successfully executed on the claim.

post.summary: Execute an operation on the claim.
post.description: Executes an operation to either confirm, cancel or complete a claim for the given ID. This endpoint should be used for back-office operations.

requestBody.description: Request body to execute an operation on the claim.

200.description: Operation successfully executed on the claim.

get.summary: Reasons list for the operations of the claims.
get.description: Return a list of reasons based on the given stakeholder, claimType and operation.

200.description: List of reasons based on the given stakeholder, claimType and operation.

get.summary: Query portability or ownership claims (Donor PSP point of view).
get.description: Generate CSV file of claims based on the given parameters.

post.description: Receives the key type to start a synchronization process and communicate with clearing

get.summary: Query Synchronizations jobs executed by a key type and a date range
get.description: Return a list of synchronizations based on the given key type and date range

200.description: List of synchronizations based on the given parameters

get.summary: Query Synchronization histories executed by a synchronization id
get.description: Return a list of synchronizations histories based on the given synchronization id

200.description: List of synchronization histories based on the given parameters

get.summary: Query divergences of synchronization in the CSV file
get.description: Returns a CSV file for a given synchronization id

post.description: Post to create the Synchronization Schedule.

get.description: Get the list of Synchronizations Schedule.

post.description: Post the Synchronization Schedule to Update by Id.

200.description: Request to Update the Synchronization Schedule was successful.

delete.description: Delete the Synchronization Schedule by Id.

200.description: List of infraction report based on the given parameters.

post.description: Used by the participant to create an infraction report for a payment transaction.

requestBody.description: Request body to create an infraction report.

get.summary: Get an infraction report for ID parameter.

post.summary: Close an infraction report for ID parameter.
post.description: Closes the infraction report. If the report was created by the Debited Person, the Creditee must perform the acknowledge and vice versa.

requestBody.description: Request body to close an infraction report.

post.summary: Cancel an infraction report for ID parameter.
post.description: Cancels the report of the infraction. It can only be done by the participant who created the report.
Receives the notification email registration request

201.description: Notification email registration request successfully accepted

put.description: Receives the notification email update request

202.description: Notification email update request was successful.

get.description: Return list where it should contain the connected bank's ispb. In the case of a direct participant, must also bring the list with name and ISPB of the indirect ones that he has

post.description: Receives the addressing key holder address request

201.description: Key holder address registration request successfully accepted

Email.description: The email for notification. More than one email separate them with a comma.

reportDetails.description: Details that can help the receiving participant to analyze the infraction report.

confirm.description: Flag indicating if the claim should be created.

stakeholder.description: The party involved in the claim.

operation.description: The operation to be executed on the claim.

reason.description: Reason used to execute the operation on the claim.

Error.description: An error when processing a request.

field.description: The field or attribute the error is related with.

action.description: Action that may be performed to solve the issue, if any.

Errors.description: A collection of errors when processing a request.

startPortability.description: Flag indicating whether the user wants to start the portability process.

startOwnership.description: Flag indicating whether the user wants to start the ownership process.

status.description: The addressing key status. It exists only for local keys.

ClaimUI.description: Local claims to the donor PSP

creationDate.description: Creation date of the claim order.

resolutionPeriodEnd.description: End of term for acceptance or cancellation of the key claim.

taxId.description: The tax id (CPF/CNPJ) of the account holder.

accountNumber.description: Número de conta, incluindo verificador. Se verificador for letra "x", o sistema irá substituir por 0.

  * `LEGAL_PERSON` - Type of legal entity owner

divergencesTotal.description: Number of divergences found in this sync operation

status.description: The synchronization status at history registry.
